steps.title: Look for the contrast
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a difference between two compositions. The notes show that Live On, Heart of My Nation features a Choctaw hymn, while Fantasy Aborigine No. 3 incorporates a Tewa seashell rattle.

steps.title: Reject general statements
steps.content:
• Choice A merely says both pieces were written by Ballard.
  • Choice B says both works blend Native traditions with Western classical music but does not assign each element to a work.
  • Choice D vaguely mentions different approaches without showing the specific difference.
The remaining choice maps each Native element to its composition. The answer is C.
